faqLink.title: Looking for Quick Answers?
faqLink.subtitle: Check out our FAQ section for instant answers to common questions

q1.question: How does Multifagro work?
q1.answer: Simply fill out our quick form with your moving details. You'll receive a detailed quote from Multifagro within minutes. Review the pricing and book directly through our platform. It's that easy!

q2.question: Is Multifagro insured?
q2.answer: Yes! Multifagro is fully licensed, insured, and our team members are background-checked. We maintain strict quality standards for all our services.

q3.question: How much does a move cost?
q3.answer: Moving costs vary based on distance, volume, and services needed. We provide transparent pricing upfront so you know exactly what you'll pay. Most local moves range from CHF 300-1,000.

q4.question: Can I get help with packing?
q4.answer: Absolutely! Multifagro offers professional packing services. You can add packing, unpacking, and packing materials when requesting your quote.

q5.question: What if something gets damaged?
q5.answer: Multifagro carries comprehensive insurance. In the rare event of damage, you're fully covered. Simply contact us and we'll help facilitate the process.

q6.question: How far in advance should I book?
q6.answer: We recommend booking 2-4 weeks in advance, especially during peak moving season (summer months). However, we can often accommodate last-minute moves within 48 hours.

q7.question: Do you serve my area?
q7.answer: We currently serve all major cities in Switzerland including Zurich, Geneva, Basel, Bern, Lausanne, and Lucerne. Enter your postcodes to check if we serve your area.

q8.question: Can I reschedule my move?
q8.answer: Yes, we allow rescheduling with adequate notice (usually 48-72 hours). Check our terms and conditions for detailed cancellation policies.

factors.title: What Affects Moving Costs?
factors.subtitle: Several factors influence the final price of your move

distance.title: Distance
distance.description: Local moves within the same city are typically less expensive than long-distance relocations.

volume.title: Volume
volume.description: The amount of items and furniture directly affects the truck size and crew needed.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.description: Stairs, elevators, and parking availability can impact the moving time and cost.

services.title: Services
services.description: Additional services like packing, unpacking, and storage add to the total cost.

timing.title: Timing
timing.description: Season and weekend moves may have higher rates than off-peak times.

estimates.title: Estimated Price Ranges - Moving Services
estimates.subtitle: Get an idea of what your move might cost (prices vary by specific details)
estimates.disclaimer: * Prices are estimates and may vary based on specific requirements, distance, and additional services. Get an accurate quote by filling out our form.

cleaningEstimates.title: Estimated Price Ranges - Cleaning Services
cleaningEstimates.subtitle: Professional cleaning services pricing (prices vary by property size and requirements)
cleaningEstimates.disclaimer: * Prices are estimates and may vary based on property size, condition, and specific cleaning requirements. Get an accurate quote by contacting us.

hero.title: Making Moving Simple
hero.subtitle: We're on a mission to transform the moving experience by providing trusted, professional moving services across Switzerland.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Multifagro was born from a simple observation: moving shouldn't be stressful. After experiencing the challenges of coordinating moves firsthand, our founders realized there had to be a better way.
story.paragraph2: We built Multifagro to be the trusted service that brings transparency, reliability, and peace of mind to every move. By maintaining high standards and providing instant quotes, we've helped thousands of families and businesses relocate with confidence.
story.paragraph3: Today, we're proud to be Switzerland's leading moving service provider, delivering professional moving services across the country. But we're just getting started.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To make every move simple, transparent, and stress-free by connecting people with trusted professionals and innovative tools that streamline the entire relocation process.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do

carrierObligations.title: Carrier Obligations
carrierObligations.item1: The carrier is obligated to provide the necessary transport vehicles for the execution of the order at the agreed time.
carrierObligations.item2: The carrier executes the order in accordance with the contract and with the necessary care.
carrierObligations.item3: Delivery of the goods at the destination must take place immediately upon arrival of the transport or by agreement.

clientObligations.title: Client Obligations
clientObligations.item1: The client is obligated to inform the carrier about the special nature of the transport goods and their susceptibility to damage.
clientObligations.item2: The client must procure the required customs documents and is responsible for their accuracy.
clientObligations.item3: The client is responsible for the parking permit and the blocking of parking spaces 48 hours before the start of the move.
clientObligations.item4: All additional costs and expenses that arise due to delayed acceptance of the transport goods by the client are to be borne by the client.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: The price is calculated according to effort or as a flat rate. For hourly effort, a minimum of 3 hours is charged.
pricing.notIncluded: The following expenses are not included in the price, subject to special agreements:

items.a: The packing and unpacking of the moving goods.
items.b: Special transport to or from the packing materials as well as their rental or purchase;
items.c: The disassembly and assembly of complicated or new furniture that requires special time or the involvement of a specialist;
items.d: The transport of refrigerators/freezers over 200 liters, pianos, grand pianos, safes and other items weighing more than 100 kg;
items.f: Additional effort for items whose transport must be carried out through windows or over balconies;
items.g: Additional expenses or additional services in the interest of the move even without special order;

cleaning.title: Cleaning
cleaning.description: Cleaning is inclusive with acceptance guarantee on the same day. Should acceptance not be possible on the cleaning day, the second trip costs extra depending on distance.
cleaning.separateOrder: The following must be ordered separately:

items.item1: Cleaning of balcony or terrace with Kärcher
items.item3: Cleaning of gallery, cellar and garage.

furnitureLift.title: Furniture Lift
furnitureLift.description: Furniture lift will be set up when needed for CHF 350.-

insurance.title: Insurance
insurance.description: Damage to your furniture or movables caused by us is insured up to the maximum amount according to the following regulation. Please note that our insurance only pays the current value of the damaged goods and not their new value.
insurance.coverage: The mentioned tariffs include business liability insurance with a liability of up to CHF 10,000,000.- The scope of coverage of the transport insurance is per moving truck up to max. CHF 50,000.-
insurance.reporting: The customer is obligated to report the damage on the moving day, at the latest 2 days later. Reports not made in time cannot be processed.

cancellation.title: Cancellation
cancellation.description: If the customer cancels the order for an important reason 15 days before the appointment, no cancellation fee will be charged. For later cancellations, 50% of the order volume will be charged.
cancellation.written: Cancellation must be made in writing in any case.

payment.title: Payment
payment.description: Moves and cleaning are generally to be paid in cash. Excluded are payments through an institution, such as social services, Pro Infirmis, company, etc.
payment.international: For transports abroad, 50% advance payment must be made.
